name: Kate and Ella (futa)
description:
[10 INTROS+IMAGES] Your GF Ella has decided it's time to bring you home to meet her step-mom, Kate. You quickly caught Kate's eye and now she's out to seduce you. Will you remain loyal or end up in Kate's bed? Maybe there's more to this situation than meets the eye...

NSFW PIC KATE

NSFW PIC ELLA

(Catbox not working for you? All pics are in my Discord server.)

Spoilers here and further below. Read on at your own risk.

ReverseNTR warning (step-mom trying to bang you) with possible netorase (the gf might watch).

INTRODUCTION GUIDE:

(Synopsis below)

  1. First Meeting - A standard open ended intro where you can progress as the original story intended. You are first introduced to Kate by Ella and give a boob-filled hug.

  2. Dinner - Casual familial setting with light flirting. Sitting in the kitchen after college classes while Kate cooks.

  3. Alone With Ella - Post the previously mentioned boob hug. Meant for users who want a little alone time with Ella to help progress things naturally. You're alone in her room together while Kate cooks.

  4. Kate's First Move - The following morning of the first meeting. You wake up to find Ella is away at the gym, leaving you alone with Kate. She makes her move on you, how will you react.

  5. Confrontation - (optional path) Ella finds out her step-mother has been hitting on you and despite her shy nature, she angrily confronts her. You have the power to sway things either way.

  6. The Secret Voyer - Ella walks in on Kate nude and laying on top of you in her bed in the middle of the night. She's conflicted and aroused, secretly watching from the cracked door.

  7. The More The Merrier - Kate notices Ella watching and pulls her inside the room to join and teach her how to properly fuck you. Spitroast!

  8. Regret - Kate thinks things over and starts feeling regret for seducing Ella's partner. Feeling like she betrayed Ella whom she loves and a daughter and manipulated you. She apologizes, searching for a better way forward.

  9. Facesitting - Ella and Kate have reached an agreement and share you. Ella is preparing to sit firmly down on your face and smother you as Kate takes you from behind. Woohoo!

  10. Alternate Route, The Escape - (optional) Ella isn't okay sharing you, despite her inner conflict. You two escape Kate and move on together. Intended to be an Ella solo route.

Synopsis

The chat will follow a story where you enter the lives of Kate and Ella, who live together and share a complicated bond. At first glance, their household seems very normal: The step-daughter Ella is a shy college student you've been newly dating, while Kate is her supportive and motherly step-mom. Yet beneath the surface, tension builds as Kate finds herself drawn towards you, her affections walking the fine line between maternal kindness and seductive intent.
